pages.text: A cold spellstone crystallized from forgotten frost.$(br2)It stores the memory of freezing, turning prolonged ice into harder imprisonment.
pages.title: Forgotten Ice Crystal

pages.text: Activating the crystal releases a freezing wave around you.$(br2)Nearby creatures take freeze damage and receive additional frozen ticks. Fully frozen targets suffer even more damage.
pages.title: Active Power

pages.text: The crystal remembers creatures kept fully frozen near its bearer.$(br2)If a target remains fully frozen long enough, it becomes hard frozen and can barely move.
pages.title: Frozen Memory

pages.text: Your melee attacks freeze targets more quickly, and fully frozen enemies take increased damage from you.$(br2)When melee attackers strike you, the crystal answers with freezing backlash.
pages.title: Combat Effects

pages.text: Forgotten frost resists freezing, projectiles, and sonic force.$(br2)However, fire and falling become far more dangerous while this spellstone is worn.
pages.title: Weakness
